claims.text: Label projection is an effective technique for cross-lingual transfer that extends span-annotated datasets from a high-resource language to low-resource ones.
claims.source_quote: Label projection is an effective technique for cross-lingual transfer, extending span-annotated datasets from a high-resource language to low-resource ones.

claims.text: Most approaches perform label projection as a separate step after machine translation.
claims.source_quote: Most approaches perform label projection as a separate step after machine translation

claims.text: Prior work that combines translation and label projection reports degraded translation quality.
claims.source_quote: prior work that combines the two reports degraded translation quality

claims.text: LabelPigeon is a novel framework that jointly performs translation and label projection via XML tags.
claims.source_quote: LabelPigeon, a novel framework that jointly performs translation and label projection via XML tags

claims.text: The authors designed a direct evaluation scheme for label projection.
claims.source_quote: We design a direct evaluation scheme for label projection

claims.text: LabelPigeon outperforms baselines on label projection evaluation.
LabelPigeon actively improves translation quality in 11 languages.
claims.source_quote: LabelPigeon outperforms baselines and actively improves translation quality in 11 languages

claims.text: Translation quality was assessed across 203 languages.
claims.source_quote: We further assess translation quality across 203 languages and varying annotation complexity

claims.text: Consistent improvement in translation quality across 203 languages is attributed to additional fine-tuning.
claims.source_quote: finding consistent improvement attributed to additional fine-tuning

claims.text: Cross-lingual transfer was evaluated across 27 languages and three downstream tasks.
claims.source_quote: across 27 languages and three downstream tasks, we report substantial gains in cross-lingual transfer

claims.text: LabelPigeon achieves substantial gains in cross-lingual transfer over comparable work, up to +39.9 F1 on NER.
claims.source_quote: we report substantial gains in cross-lingual transfer over comparable work, up to +39.9 F1 on NER

claims.text: XML-tagged label projection provides effective and efficient label transfer without compromising translation quality.
claims.source_quote: our results demonstrate that XML-tagged label projection provides effective and efficient label transfer without compromising translation quality
